violations.description: Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. Roller grill does not have a cover to protect from consumer contamination. Food items should be protected from contamination.

Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. Probe thermometer was not available for checking internal food temperatures. Thermometer should be available for checking internal food temperatures.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
